\section*{Ethics Statement}
\label{sec:ethics}

We position our system as an advanced assistive tool designed to accelerate the drafting process of AI research papers, rather than an independent entity capable of claiming authorship. Human researchers must retain full accountability for the factual accuracy, originality, and validity of the claims presented in any generated manuscript. While \ourmethod{} incorporates robust programmatic safeguards (such as API-grounded citation validation) to minimize hallucinations and ensure academic rigor, users are responsible for verifying the outputs to prevent the propagation of LLM-derived biases or misinformation.
